backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Deeds backend, defining data types and state maps for user profiles, posts, comments, likes, follows, messages, notifications, live sessions, blogs, marketplace, albums, and more, with access control initialization and role management.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report tracking two logo replacement tasks: updating the Header component and the main page hero section to use the saved Deeds logo asset at '/assets/generated/deeds-logo.png'.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details, serving as a reference for the current state of all frontend components and hooks.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the Deeds React app, setting the favicon, viewport, description meta tag, and mounting the app into a div with id 'root'.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for Deeds, defining the app name, display mode, theme color, and icon assets for home screen installation.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a versioned caching strategy: always-fresh for JS/CSS bundles, network-first for navigation, cache-first for assets, and network-first for everything else, with old cache cleanup on activation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, wraps the app in providers (QueryClient, InternetIdentity, Language, Theme), and handles service worker update banners and startup recovery.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Admin dashboard component that verifies caller admin status via the backend actor and, if authorized, renders tabbed panels for service status, storage cleanup, network, database, and system management.
frontend/src/components/BlogCard.tsx: Renders a single blog post card with author avatar, timestamp, media type badges, like/comment counts, and a collapsible content view. Clicking the author opens a UserProfileModal.
frontend/src/components/BlogPage.tsx: Displays the blog listing page with a sorted list of BlogCard components, loading skeletons, an empty state, and a button to open the CreateBlogModal.
frontend/src/components/ChallengesSectio: Empty file with no content or exports.
Renders a comments section for a post with a textarea form for new comments and a sorted list of existing CommentItem components; comment creation is stubbed as not yet implemented.
frontend/src/components/CreateBlogButton: A button component that toggles the CreateBlogModal open when clicked.
A dialog form for creating a new blog post with fields for title, content, categories, tags, live toggle, and multi-file media uploads with progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/CreateMarketplac: A dialog form for creating a marketplace post with fields for title, description, location, contact method, category, offer/need type, and optional single-file media upload.
frontend/src/components/CreatePostButton: A styled button that opens the CreatePostModal for sharing a good deed post.
A dialog form for creating a social post with caption, category, photo/video upload, image filter sliders, and music selection; submits via the useCreatePost mutation.
frontend/src/components/DeedsBar.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/DiscoverFeed.tsx: Renders a filterable, sortable discover feed of all posts with filter options for 'For You', 'Trending', 'Videos', and 'Photos', showing skeleton loaders while fetching.
frontend/src/components/Feed.tsx: Renders the main social feed with filter tabs (All, Videos, Photos, Text), sorted by timestamp, and includes a CreatePostButton for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/FollowersModal.t: Dialog modal that displays a scrollable list of a user's followers, fetching each follower's profile to show their avatar and bio.
frontend/src/components/FollowingModal.t: Dialog modal that displays a scrollable list of users a given principal is following, fetching each profile for avatar and bio display.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying copyright year and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link.
frontend/src/components/FriendsStatusFee: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Gate.tsx: Landing/home page component showing the app logo, feature cards (Video Reels, Text Posts, Community), and a trending blogs section with navigation to key routes.
frontend/src/components/GradeDeedsRating: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation header with a logo, dropdown navigation menu, messages button for authenticated users, and a login/logout button with loading state.
frontend/src/components/HeaderMoreMenu.t: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/IconBadge.tsx: Reusable presentational component that renders a Lucide icon with optional label, supporting size and variant styling props.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/LiveChatPanel.ts: A live chat panel component for a given session that displays comments in a scrollable list with auto-scroll, and allows authenticated users to submit new messages via a form.
frontend/src/components/LiveFeed.tsx: Displays a grid of active live streaming sessions fetched from the backend, with options to join a session or start a new one via modals.
A modal dialog that shows a simulated live stream video placeholder alongside the LiveChatPanel for a selected live session.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: A login landing page card that presents the app's value propositions and triggers Internet Identity authentication with a loading overlay during login.
frontend/src/components/LogoShowcase.tsx: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Marketplace.tsx: A marketplace page that fetches and displays posts filtered by type (all/needs/offers) and sorted by newest, popularity, or proximity, with a modal for creating new posts.
A card component for a single marketplace post that shows the author's avatar, post details, category badge, and action buttons for saving and messaging.
frontend/src/components/Messages.tsx: A messaging UI component that displays a list of followed users and allows the current user to send messages to a selected friend, with toast notifications for success/failure.
frontend/src/components/ModerationWarnin: A styled alert banner component that displays a moderation warning message with an icon and animated gradient background.
frontend/src/components/NotificationsPan: A dialog panel that fetches and displays sorted notifications, allowing users to mark individual notifications as read.
frontend/src/components/PhotoTextReelCar: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: A card component that renders a social media post with author info, caption, photo, category badge, like/share/comment actions, and links to user profile and comments section.
frontend/src/components/Profile.tsx: The current user's profile page showing their avatar, posts, followers/following counts, albums, notifications, and options to edit profile picture and status.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for new users to set up their profile by entering a name, bio, and optional profile picture, with a blocking backdrop to prevent dismissal.
An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/ReelActionOverla: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/ReelBottomNav.ts: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/ReelBottomTabNav: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/ReelHome.tsx: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/SafeImageIcon.ts: A wrapper image component that renders an img tag with lazy loading and falls back to an icon or text if the image fails to load.
frontend/src/components/Search.tsx: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/SearchWithSi.tsx: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/ServiceStatusChe: A card component that checks and displays the backend service health status (operational state and photo system) using the actor's healthcheckWithPhotos method, with admin-only access handling.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonBlog.tsx: A skeleton loading placeholder component for blog post cards, mimicking the layout with avatar, title, text lines, image grid, and footer action buttons.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonMarketpl: A skeleton loading placeholder component for marketplace listing cards, mimicking the full card layout including header, image, metadata, pricing section, and action buttons.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonPost.tsx: A skeleton loading placeholder component for social post cards, mimicking the avatar, text content, image, and footer action buttons layout.
frontend/src/components/Space.tsx: A simple informational page component displaying two cards describing the cosmic atmosphere and customization features of the Space theme.
frontend/src/components/StarEffectLogo.t: A canvas-based component that renders an animated star particle system orbiting around a logo image, with twinkling and rotating 4-pointed star effects.
frontend/src/components/StartLiveModal.t: A modal component for starting and managing a live video streaming session, with camera/microphone controls, live chat panel integration, and session start/end mutations.
frontend/src/components/StartupRecoveryS: A full-screen recovery UI shown when the app fails to load, offering a button to clear cache and reload via the performFullRecovery utility, with context-aware messaging.
frontend/src/components/StorageCleanup.t: React component providing a UI for performing IC blob storage health checks and deep cleanup operations, with progress tracking and result display.
frontend/src/components/TopLevelErrorBou: React class-based error boundary that catches unhandled errors app-wide and displays a fallback UI with a reload button.
frontend/src/components/UpdateAvailableB: Fixed banner component that notifies users of available app updates and provides options to update or perform a full cache recovery if the reload is blocked.
frontend/src/components/UpdateStatusModa: Modal dialog allowing users to update their status text, attach a status image, and upload or select background music for their profile.
frontend/src/components/UserProfileModal: Modal dialog that displays a user's profile information, follower/following counts, and their posts, with a follow button for other users.
frontend/src/components/WeatherBackgroun: Canvas-based animated background component that renders rain or snow particle effects and dynamic gradient backgrounds based on current weather conditions and time of day.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Defines a React context for multi-language support (10 languages) with a translation lookup function `t` and persists the selected language via state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeedsUsage.ts: Tracks per-session and daily app usage time using sessionStorage/localStorage, updating every second for session duration and every 10 seconds for daily totals.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout state and identity through a React context provider and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profiles, albums, status updates, music attachments, and posts via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useServiceWorkerUpdat: Detects available service worker updates and stale caches, exposes an `activateUpdate` function, and guards against reload loops using a reload count utility.
frontend/src/hooks/useWeather.ts: Fetches real-time weather data from the OpenMeteo API using the user's geolocation, maps weather codes to conditions, and falls back to time-based day/night defaults on error.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes (colors, radius) plus a fade-in animation utility.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/utils/swRecovery.ts: Provides utility functions for service worker recovery, including clearing caches, unregistering service workers, managing recovery cooldown state, and performing a full recovery with page reload.
frontend/src/utils/swReloadGuard.ts: Tracks and limits service-worker-triggered page reloads per session using sessionStorage to prevent infinite reload loops.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/src/utils/videoLayoutPersistenc: Empty file with no content, likely a placeholder for video layout persistence utilities.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration mapping CSS custom property tokens to theme colors/radii, adding accordion keyframe animations, and registering the tailwindcss-animate and @tailwindcss/typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the 'Deeds' project, noting a known logo revert issue and two existing fix features that update logo image sources in the Header and hero section components to point to the saved asset path.
